methodology.baseline_source: Typical AI agent behavior without structured workflow
scoring_criteria: Assumptions: tech choices made without asking user
Rework: user correction → AI rewrites code
Corrections: user has to redirect AI
Questions: clarify questions asked before coding
Tests: tests run before reporting done
methodology.disclaimer: Preliminary results from a small sample (n=5). Individual results may vary based on task complexity, model, and context.

trials_with_skill.task: Add /api/health endpoint returning status, uptime, memory
trials_with_skill.note: Straightforward. No ambiguity, no questions needed.
Asked 1 question. Plan confirmed. Clean execution.

trials_with_skill.task: User registration with email validation and password hashing
trials_with_skill.clarify_reason: DB choice and password rules unclear
trials_with_skill.correction_detail: User wanted email uniqueness check, not mentioned initially
trials_with_skill.note: Asked 2 questions. During execution, user added email uniqueness requirement. Looped back, adjusted.

trials_with_skill.task: Rate limiting and input validation on POST endpoints
trials_with_skill.clarify_reason: rate limit threshold and validation rules unclear

trials_with_skill.task: Full CRUD for products with pagination, search, category filter
trials_with_skill.clarify_reason: pagination style, search fields, filter logic unclear
trials_with_skill.correction_detail: Assumed offset pagination, user wanted cursor-based
trials_with_skill.note: Asked 3 questions. Missed pagination style. User corrected, adjusted.

baseline_without_skill.note: Assumed port and response format. User corrected.
Guessed token storage location and expiry. Two corrections needed.
Wrong DB choice, wrong validation rules, no password hashing initially.
Assumed rate limit threshold. User corrected once.
Wrong pagination, wrong search logic, no filter, wrong error format.
